name: Isidor Tichy
description:
A person he's never seen or heard of before?

Wait, you don't even have any registration!?

Okay what's going on here...

Notes:

Webtoon grabbed me by my throat and forced me to read this, I love this to say the least.

I want to strangle this pathetic excuse of a man, yet at the same time sob while doing so.

Anyways y'all should definitely read Artificial Idiocy, it doesn't even have a fan wiki that I could find 🥲
creator: Kit__
